description: Custom code patterns for ext-mgr import wizard. Add patterns here to detect and optionally auto-fix code issues during import.

patterns.label: Example custom pattern
patterns.description: This is an example pattern showing the structure. Remove or modify as needed.
patterns.fix_description: Description of how to fix this pattern manually

_notes: Pattern is a Python regex (case-insensitive by default)
Files is a list of glob patterns to match filenames
Autofix: true = wizard will attempt automatic fix, false = manual review
Severity 'upgradeable' indicates patterns the wizard can auto-upgrade
